title: pilosella euchaetia
intro: Pilosella euchaetia, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a rare plant species belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae). It is primarily found in mountainous regions of Europe, particularly in the UK, where it thrives in acidic soils and moist environments. The medicinal properties of Pilosella euchaetia lie in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and creams, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of eczema, acne, and other skin issues.
